title: Kenyan BBQ Chicken Skewers
description: A flavor-packed dish that combines the spices of Kenya with the charred goodness of BBQ chicken.

ingredients.name: Kenyan spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most African or Middle Eastern grocery stores

ingredients.name: Smoky paprika
ingredients.notes: Add a smoky flavor to your chicken

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for at least 30 minutes before use

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Kenyan spice blend, smoky paprika, and olive oil.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the skewers.
Brush the skewers with blueberry BBQ sauce.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
